description: A vertical graphic on a dark navy background. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services appear at the top left. White and gold text gives a long quotation about an America First approach, restoring order and integrity to the immigration system, and securing the border. A large gold 2025 with the words END-OF-YEAR REVIEW sits at the lower right. Bold text attributes the quote to the USCIS Director, Joseph B. Edlow.
notable_text: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; USCIS has taken an 'America First' approach; END-OF-YEAR REVIEW 2025; USCIS Director Joseph B. Edlow
